Write a single-site CF-standard NetCDF file

Source: R/drivers.R
dot-write_site_cf_nc.Rd

Creates a CF-1.8 compliant NetCDF with latitude, longitude, and unlimited time dimensions. Used internally by cae_build_met_drivers().

Usage

.write_site_cf_nc(converted, time_vals, lat, lon, outfile, year)

Arguments

converted

named list of CF variable names -> numeric vectors

time_vals

POSIXct vector of timesteps

lat

numeric; site latitude (WGS84)

lon

numeric; site longitude (WGS84)

outfile

character; output file path

year

integer; reference year for time origin

On this page
